title: xanthophyllum nitidum
intro: Xanthophyllum nitidum is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family, native to Southeast Asia. The leaves and stems of Xanthophyllum nitidum are used in traditional medicine, rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Xanthophyllum nitidum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the leaves and stems in water, and is used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
